user.title: Detect Argon Industria OLED
user.description: The integration automatically detects an SSD1306 display on I²C bus 1 at address 0x3C. Set a timeout to automatically clear the screen after inactivity (0 = disabled).

data_description.screen_timeout: Seconds of inactivity before the screen is cleared. Set to 0 to disable.

abort.display_not_found: The OLED display was not detected at I²C bus 1 address 0x3C.
abort.cannot_initialize_display: The OLED was detected but could not be initialized.
abort.unknown: An unknown error occurred during display detection.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Argon Industria OLED configuration is supported.

error.display_not_found: The OLED display was not detected at I²C bus 1 address 0x3C.
error.cannot_initialize_display: The OLED was detected but could not be initialized.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred during display detection.

data_description.screen_timeout: Seconds of inactivity before the screen is cleared. Set to 0 to disable.
